data.name: A live package is available for APT clients.
data.value: A live package is available for APT clients.

data.name: Are you sure you want to delete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: Each LocalPackage maps to one repo+suite+arch combination. The Repository Sync job copies them into live buckets.
data.value: Each LocalPackage maps to one repo+suite+arch combination. The Repository Sync job copies them into live buckets.

data.name: Enabled packages are merged into the next Repository Sync and override any upstream mirror package with the same name and architecture. Disabled packages are excluded entirely.
data.value: Enabled packages are merged into the next Repository Sync and override any upstream mirror package with the same name and architecture. Disabled packages are excluded entirely.

data.name: Excluded from Repository Sync: will not appear in the generated package index.
data.value: Excluded from Repository Sync: will not appear in the generated package index.

data.name: Included in the next Repository Sync: will override any upstream mirror package with the same name and architecture.
data.value: Included in the next Repository Sync: will override any upstream mirror package with the same name and architecture.

data.name: LocalPackages are .deb files extracted from .apkg uploads. They sit in a staging area before being synced to APT repositories.
data.value: LocalPackages are .deb files extracted from .apkg uploads. They sit in a staging area before being synced to APT repositories.

data.name: The current progress of this package being merged and signed into the live repository. The sync job runs every 20 minutes, followed by a sign job every 5 minutes.
data.value: The current progress of this package being merged and signed into the live repository. The sync job runs every 20 minutes, followed by a sign job every 5 minutes.
